overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Horizon Forbidden West opens with a slow tilt-up shot of a tropical river valley containing ancient stone ruins, transitioning from bright daylight to dark storm clouds before cutting to third-person gameplay. The protagonist Aloy is shown wading through a crystal-clear shallow river surrounded by rocky banks and lush vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical river valley with ancient stone ruins

events.description: camera begins slow tilt upward from landscape toward the sky

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint slowly tilting upward from the river valley to focus on the sky

entered.detail: clear turquoise water flowing through the valley with visible stones beneath
tall stone towers and temple structures covered in jungle vegetation
dense tropical trees and foliage surrounding the river banks
moss-covered rock face with large green ferns in the foreground
large white fluffy clouds against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stunning tropical river valley with ancient stone ruins rising in the distance. The camera remains stationary but slowly tilts upward, gradually shifting focus from the water and ruins toward the sky while maintaining the rocky cliff with ferns in the right foreground.

events.description: clouds darken significantly as sun becomes obscured, transitioning from bright to stormy atmosphere

agents.ego_description: continuing to tilt upward focusing on the cloud formations as they darken

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying through the clouds

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues tilting upward, the landscape exits the frame leaving only the sky and the rocky cliff edge. The bright white clouds gradually darken into storm clouds, creating a dramatic shift in lighting and atmosphere before the screen fades to black.

events.description: cut from black to third-person view of character standing in shallow water
character begins wading forward through the river

agents.ego_description: third-person camera follows closely behind a female warrior character as she wades through the clear shallow river

notable_agents.action: female warrior with red hair and tribal armor wading slowly through knee-deep water, carrying a bow on her back

entered.detail: crystal clear water with visible river stones and aquatic plants on the bottom
dark rocky shore with patches of green moss and grass
tropical trees lining the far river bank
large boulders and rock formations across the river

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to third-person gameplay showing the protagonist wading through a shallow, crystal-clear river. The camera follows behind as she moves forward through the water, with rocky banks and lush jungle vegetation visible on the shores.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow vertical tilt that transforms a bright tropical valley into a dark, ominous storm. It begins with a view of a stunning river valley where ancient stone ruins rise in the distance, framed by a rocky cliff and ferns in the foreground. As the camera tilts upward, the focus shifts away from the water and ruins, gradually moving the landscape out of the frame. The scene then opens entirely to the sky, where bright white clouds rapidly darken into heavy storm clouds. This dramatic shift in lighting and atmosphere continues until the screen finally fades to black.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cinematic vista into an intimate third-person perspective of a tropical river. It begins by shifting focus toward the protagonist as she enters a shallow, crystal-clear river. As she wades forward, the camera tracks closely behind her, maintaining a steady pace through the shimmering water. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding environment, moving past rocky banks and dense, lush jungle vegetation that lines the shores.
